title: Kalevala: Louhi, Mistress of the North
description: The sorceress Louhi steals the sun and moon, plunging the world into darkness until Vainamoinen tricks her.
introduction: The sorceress Louhi steals the sun and moon, plunging the world into darkness until Vainamoinen tricks her.

translation.text: Louhi, the gap-toothed mistress of Pohjola, stole the sun from the sky and the moon from its place.
